#### The Maintenance Regulation: applications for enforcement or for refusal or suspension of enforcement E+W


F130 34.36C. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .


Textual Amendments


F130 Rule 34.36C omitted (31.12.2020) by virtue of The Family Procedure Rules 2010 and Court of Protection Rules 2017 (Amendment) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (S.I. 2019/517) , regs. 1(1) , 19(15) (with reg. 27 ) (as amended by S.I. 2020/1574 , regs. 1 , 4(2) and S.I. 2020/1493 , regs. 1(1) , 8(2)(f) ); 2020 c. 1 , Sch. 5 para. 1(1)


### SECTION 2 E+W Reciprocal enforcement in a Contracting State F131 ... of Orders of a court in England and Wales


Textual Amendments


F131 Words in Pt. 34 Ch. 3 Section 2 heading omitted (31.12.2020) by virtue of The Family Procedure Rules 2010 and Court of Protection Rules 2017 (Amendment) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (S.I. 2019/517) , regs. 1(1) , 19(16) (with reg. 27 ) (as amended by S.I. 2020/1574 , regs. 1 , 4(2) and S.I. 2020/1493 , regs. 1(1) , 8(2)(f) ); 2020 c. 1 , Sch. 5 para. 1(1)
